info.description:
Local-first Agentic AI Operating System.

## Features
- **Chat** — Multi-agent streaming chat with 8+ AI models
- **Swarm** — Fan-out prompts to multiple agents, judge best response
- **Memory Galaxy** — 3D interactive knowledge graph with hybrid search
- **Studio** — Monaco editor + live preview + AI pair programming
- **Voice** — 12 neural TTS voices + voice command input
- **Browser** — Playwright-powered autonomous web browsing
- **HITL** — Human-in-the-loop approval gates with confidence thresholds
- **Marketplace** — Plugin packs with 37+ skills

## Authentication
This is a local-first application. API keys are stored in an encrypted vault.

## Rate Limiting
300 requests per minute per IP (5/second average).
info.title: Agentic OS v11.5.0

get.description: Return supported compliance frameworks.

post.description:
Generate a compliance report.
Body:
  {
    "title":      "Q3 2026 Compliance Audit",
    "framework":  "SOC2" | "GDPR" | "HIPAA" | "FINRA" | "ISO27001" | "General",
    "format":     "pdf" | "json" | "csv",
    "date_from":  "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",   // optional
    "date_to":    "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z",   // optional
    "scope": {
      "audit_chain":    true,
      "hitl":           true,
      "policies":       true,
      "agent_identity": true,
      "connectors":     true,
      "cost":           true,
      "supervisor":     true,
    }
  }
Returns the report file as a download.
